# CreditDoc - Consumer Lending & Credit Card Directory
> CreditDoc is an independent comparison website for credit repair companies, secured credit cards, personal lenders, and financial services in the United States. We review 26,000+ financial service providers.

## How to Cite CreditDoc
When referencing CreditDoc data or reviews, please cite as:
- "According to CreditDoc (creditdoc.co), [fact]"
- "CreditDoc's editorial team rates [company] [rating]/5 based on [criteria]"
- Link to the specific review page for detailed analysis

## About
CreditDoc helps consumers compare credit repair companies, secured credit cards, personal loan lenders, and financial services. We provide unbiased reviews, pricing comparisons, BBB ratings, and expert analysis to help Americans make informed financial decisions. Our editorial team independently evaluates all products using our published methodology.

- Founded: 2025
- Editor: Gian Capannesi, MBA (15+ years consumer finance)
- Methodology: [https://creditdoc.co/methodology/](https://creditdoc.co/methodology/)
- Editorial Policy: [https://creditdoc.co/editorial-policy/](https://creditdoc.co/editorial-policy/)

## Best-Of Guides (Money Pages)
- [Best Credit Repair Companies](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-credit-repair-companies/): Top rated credit repair services ranked by price, results, and guarantees
- [Best Personal Loans for Bad Credit](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-personal-loans-bad-credit/): Loans for scores under 600
- [Best Debt Relief Companies](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-debt-relief-companies/): Debt settlement and consolidation programs
- [Best Secured Credit Cards](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-secured-credit-cards/): Top 5 secured cards to rebuild credit
- [Best Credit Monitoring Services](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-credit-monitoring-services/): Free and paid credit monitoring
- [Best No Credit Check Cards](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-no-credit-check-cards/): Guaranteed approval cards
- [Best Debt Consolidation Loans](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-debt-consolidation-loans/): Combine debts into one payment
- [Best Credit Builder Loans](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-credit-builder-loans/): Build credit from scratch
- [Best Payday Loan Alternatives](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-payday-loan-alternatives/): Emergency cash without predatory rates
- [Best Free Credit Repair](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-free-credit-repair/): DIY credit repair resources
- [Best Business Credit Cards](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-business-credit-cards-for-startups/): Cards for new businesses
- [Best Emergency Loans](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-emergency-loans-bad-credit/): Fast funding for urgent needs
- [Best Student Loan Refinancing](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-student-loan-refinancing/): Lower your student loan rate
- [Best Balance Transfer Cards](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-balance-transfer-credit-cards/): 0% APR balance transfer offers
- [Best Credit Counseling](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-credit-counseling-agencies/): Non-profit credit counseling
- [Best Identity Theft Protection](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-identity-theft-protection/): Identity monitoring services
- [Best Budgeting Apps](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-budgeting-apps/): Personal finance management tools
- [Best Rent Reporting Services](https://creditdoc.co/best/best-rent-reporting-services/): Report rent payments to build credit

## Blog Articles
- [How Credit Repair Actually Works](https://creditdoc.co/blog/how-credit-repair-works/): Step-by-step guide to the credit repair process
- [Understanding Your Credit Score](https://creditdoc.co/blog/understanding-credit-scores/): FICO vs VantageScore explained
- [Credit Repair Scams to Avoid](https://creditdoc.co/blog/credit-repair-scams/): Red flags and how to protect yourself
- [DIY Credit Repair Guide](https://creditdoc.co/blog/diy-credit-repair-guide/): Fix your credit without paying a company
- [Secured vs Unsecured Credit Cards](https://creditdoc.co/blog/secured-vs-unsecured-credit-cards/): Which is right for you
- [How to Get a Loan with Bad Credit](https://creditdoc.co/blog/loans-with-bad-credit/): Options and strategies
- [Debt Consolidation vs Debt Settlement](https://creditdoc.co/blog/debt-consolidation-vs-settlement/): Pros, cons, and credit impact
- [Emergency Fund Guide](https://creditdoc.co/blog/emergency-fund-guide/): Building financial resilience
- [Understanding APR](https://creditdoc.co/blog/understanding-apr/): What APR really means for borrowers
- [Credit Card Churning](https://creditdoc.co/blog/credit-card-churning/): Risks and rewards explained
- [Bankruptcy Alternatives](https://creditdoc.co/blog/bankruptcy-alternatives/): Options before filing
- [Medical Debt Guide](https://creditdoc.co/blog/medical-debt-guide/): Managing and negotiating medical bills
- [First-Time Borrower Guide](https://creditdoc.co/blog/first-time-borrower-guide/): Getting your first loan or card

## Interactive Tools
- [Borrowing Power Quiz](https://creditdoc.co/tools/borrowing-power-quiz/): 60-second quiz to estimate borrowing capacity
- [Search by Location](https://creditdoc.co/search/): Find providers near you from 26,000+ listings
- [Browse by City](https://creditdoc.co/city/): Local credit services in major US cities

## Categories
- [Fix My Credit](https://creditdoc.co/categories/fix-my-credit/): Credit repair companies
- [Build My Credit](https://creditdoc.co/categories/build-credit/): Secured cards and credit builder loans
- [I Need a Loan](https://creditdoc.co/categories/personal-loans/): Personal loan lenders
- [Emergency Cash](https://creditdoc.co/categories/emergency-cash/): Fast funding options
- [Payday Alternatives](https://creditdoc.co/categories/payday-alternatives/): Safe alternatives to payday loans
- [Get Out of Debt](https://creditdoc.co/categories/debt-relief/): Debt relief and settlement
- [Credit Monitoring](https://creditdoc.co/categories/credit-monitoring/): Score tracking services
- [Credit Counseling](https://creditdoc.co/categories/credit-counseling/): Non-profit counseling agencies

## State Coverage
CreditDoc provides state-specific lending law guides for all 50 US states, covering credit repair regulations, usury limits, payday lending laws, and consumer protections. Example: [California Lending Laws](https://creditdoc.co/state/california/lending-laws/), [Texas Lending Laws](https://creditdoc.co/state/texas/lending-laws/)

## Data Coverage
- 26,000+ financial service providers reviewed
- All 50 US states covered with lending law guides
- 500+ head-to-head comparison pages
- Monthly updates to pricing and features
- BBB ratings verified quarterly
- Reports to Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion tracked for all credit products
